turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Ordering at a café 🗨️ “Hi, I would like to order a coffee today!”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! What kind of coffee would you like today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I would like a coffee with milk without sugar

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it — a coffee with milk, no sugar. Would you like that hot or iced?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hot, please.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, one hot coffee with milk. What size would you like — small, medium, or large?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I'd like a medium coffee and a small coffee for my husband.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, one medium and one small coffee, both with milk and no sugar — is your husband’s coffee also hot?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Please, coffee my husband, hot too, and small coffee.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure thing — both hot coffees, one medium for you and one small for your husband. Would you like to have them here or take them away?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: What do you suggest to eat while I drink my coffee?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Good question! We’ve got some nice pastries — croissants, muffins, and a few slices of cake. Do you prefer something sweet or more savory to go with your coffee?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I prefer eating sweet.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Nice choice! We’ve got chocolate muffins, almond croissants, and carrot cake. Which one sounds good to you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, I can. Chocolate muffins and my husband's carrot cake.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great! So that’s one chocolate muffin for you and one slice of carrot cake for your husband. Would you like me to warm them up a little?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I love this song.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Oh, it’s a good one, isn’t it? We play it here a lot. Do you like listening to music while you have your coffee?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, I like. I like music calm.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Nice! Calm music goes perfectly with coffee time. Do you usually listen to that kind of music at home too?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, in the morning i like listening when I eat my breakfast

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That sounds lovely — a calm start to the day. What do you usually have for breakfast?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Usually, I eat bread, eggs, and avocado, and drink coffee at the morning in my breakfast.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Mmm, that sounds delicious and healthy! Do you make your coffee at home the same way you order it here — with milk and no sugar?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I drink coffee with milk and no sugar. I don't like sugar.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it — you really like your coffee pure! Do you prefer using regular milk or something like oat or almond milk?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I use some things oat, some things almond, almond because I don't can drink milk, because I have lactose, I need lactose free.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Ah, I see — you’re lactose intolerant, so you go for oat or almond milk instead. Would you like me to make your coffee with lactose-free milk today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I bought the milk lactose-free. Then, in the morning, I make my coffee.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s a smart choice! It’s nice to start the day with coffee you make yourself. Do you usually eat breakfast alone or with someone?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Every day I have, I eat my breakfast with my husband.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s lovely — sharing breakfast makes mornings nicer. Do you and your husband like the same kind of coffee?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, he drink the same coffee and eat it too.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: How nice — you two have the same taste! Do you both like going to cafés together sometimes, like today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, we enjoy go in the restaurant and bars and coffees because we need eating the new food and have the more experience.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s wonderful — trying new food is such a fun way to spend time together. What kind of new food do you like to try most?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Maybe if I went to Brazil, then now I stay in Australia, I eat new foods. But I prefer Brazilian food because maybe I think my natural foods. But I don't like industrial foods, eating industrial foods.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I understand — you prefer fresh, homemade food, not processed ones. What’s your favorite Brazilian dish that you miss the most here in Australia?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Polenta with free-range chicken meat

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Mmm, that sounds amazing — so comforting! Do you ever cook polenta and chicken yourself at home here?
